hook: معظم فرق إدارة المرافق والصيانة تخسر هامشها في مكان واحد: No evidence trail when a client disputes completion.
body:
معظم فرق إدارة المرافق والصيانة تخسر هامشها في مكان واحد: No evidence trail when a client disputes completion.

في ديالكس نحوكم سير العمل — لا نكتفي بأتمتته. نشارك أصل الإثبات أولًا: Work-order leakage map: a sample audit of 30 anonymized work orders showing SLA risk and unbilled value, with the top 3 governed fixes.

دون أي وصول لبياناتكم. بمراجعة المؤسس. ادعاءات متحفظة وقابلة للإثبات فقط — بلا ضمانات.

راسلني بكلمة (تدقيق) لتشخيص سير العمل.

#B2B #AIOperations #SaudiBusiness #حوكمة #تشغيل_الإيراد #FacilitiesManagement #Maintenance

hook: We mapped 30 anonymized records for a contracting & project controls team. The leak was clear: the approval steps with no audit trail for arbitration.
body:
We mapped 30 anonymized records for a contracting & project controls team. The leak was clear: the approval steps with no audit trail for arbitration.

At Dealix we govern the workflow — not just automate it. We share a proof asset first: Variation-order governance map: a redacted review of one project's variations showing approval gaps and at-risk claimable value.

No access to your data. Founder-reviewed. Conservative, provable claims only — no guarantees.

Book a founder-led diagnostic — link in bio.

#RevenueOps #Dealix #GCC #Contracting #ProjectControls
cta: Book a founder-led diagnostic — link in bio.

hook: If you run legal & professional services, here's a 20-minute way to see where revenue leaks.
body:
If you run legal & professional services, here's a 20-minute way to see where revenue leaks.

At Dealix we govern the workflow — not just automate it. We share a proof asset first: Intake-to-billing governance map: a privacy-first review of a redacted intake/billing sample showing bottlenecks and an audit-ready fix plan.
